title: Pregnancy/Childbirth Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Health Care > Pregnancy/Childbirth Support Groups 6 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community No Filter African American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF 211INFO 211INFO MATERNAL AND CHILD HEALTH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF 211info's Maternal and Child Health Program provides specialized information, referral, and follow-up services to individuals and family members of all genders covering needs and questions related to pregnancy, maternal and child health, sexual and reproductive health, and women's health across the life span, including resources for women with breast cancer. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Email 211 Visit Website More Details LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a faith based support group that focuses on goal setting and planning. Participants can attend the annual infant and children's clothing swap and baby shower. Offers information on additional community resources. Accepts gently used maternity clothing and baby furniture and clothing. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Single and pregnant women Hours: Monday 6pm and Tuesday 5pm Email (971) 420-6801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER PARENTING GROUPS AND CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides childbirth education, newborn care classes, safe sleep workshop, breastfeeding workshop/support, and other classes which vary by season. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Most classes are for parents and other caregivers of children under the age of 5 Hours: Class times vary Email (503) 249-5801 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT NORTH EAST HEALTH CENTER AND DENTAL CLINIC HEALTHY BIRTH INITIATIVE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home visits, health education, and support groups from pregnancy through the child's second year. Offers reduced-cost car seats, as well as certified assistance in installation. 5329 NE Martin Luther King Jr Boulevard Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Home visiting services: Pregnant African American women who are less than 18 weeks gestation. Those over 18 weeks gestation can still participate in support groups and classes. Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6:30pm (503) 988-3387 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CENTER FOR WOMEN’S HEALTH CHILDBIRTH AND PARENTING PREPARATION CLASSES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a variety of prenatal, childbirth, newborn care, breastfeeding education, and infant safety classes. Also offers several support groups, such as a new moms group. 808 SW Campus Drive 7th Floor Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Varies Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 418-4500 Get Directions Visit Website More Details WELLMAMA MATERNAL MENTAL HEALTH AND SUPPORT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides peer support, support groups, and wellness services to people affected by or at risk for mental health conditions related to parenthood. Support people, including partners and babies under age 1, are welcome at all meetings. 576 Olive Street Suite 205 Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Families struggling with emotions related to reproductive health, such as pregnancy, the first few years postpartum, and perinatal loss Hours: Support group times vary Email (541) 525-0495 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP EMBRACE GRACE MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER PARENTING GROUPS AND CLASSES MULTNOMAH COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT HEALTHY BIRTH INITIATIVE OHSU CENTER FOR WOMEN'S HEALTH CHILDBIRTH AND PARENTING PREPARATION CLASSES WELLMAMA MATERNAL MENTAL HEALTH AND SUPPORT SERVICES
